org.docgene.model

Class XMLComment

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLComment
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ImportanceType, ParagraphElement, ReviewElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLComment
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElement, ReviewElement, ImportanceType
    Represent the content of a <comment> tag.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.ImportanceType

        CRITICAL, IMPORTANT, NORMAL

      Return the comment index.

      Return the comment reference composed using the comment index.

      Return the text of the comment.

      Return the type of the comment.

      Return true if the comment has an author.

      Return true if the comment has a date.
